# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy_staging
  - deploy_production

variables:
  ARTIFACT_EXPIRE: "30 days"
  BUILD_DIR: "dist"
  BIN_DIR: "dist/bin"
  CFG_DIR: "dist/config"
  DEPLOY_DIR: "deploy"
  DEPLOY_SCRIPT: "deploy/run.sh"

workflow:
  rules:
    - when: always

.default_artifacts: &default_artifacts
  expire_in: $ARTIFACT_EXPIRE
  when: always
  name: "${CI_PROJECT_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
  paths:
    - $BUILD_DIR/

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:3.20
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache bash coreutils
    - mkdir -p "$BIN_DIR" "$CFG_DIR"
    - printf '#!/usr/bin/env sh\nset -e\nprintf "Hello from %s (%s)\\n" "${CI_PROJECT_NAME}" "${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"\n' > "$BIN_DIR/app"
    - chmod +x "$BIN_DIR/app"
    - printf 'commit=%s\nref=%s\n' "$CI_COMMIT_SHA" "$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME" > "$CFG_DIR/app.conf"
  artifacts:
    <<: *default_artifacts

test:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - test -x "$BIN_DIR/app"
    - test -f "$CFG_DIR/app.conf"
    - "$BIN_DIR/app"
    - cat "$CFG_DIR/app.conf"

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy_staging
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  environment:
    name: staging
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache bash
    - mkdir -p "$DEPLOY_DIR"
    - printf '#!/usr/bin/env sh\nset -e\necho "Deploying to STAGING"\n./dist/bin/app\necho "--- config ---"\ncat ./dist/config/app.conf\n' > "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
    - chmod +x "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
    - "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT"

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy_production
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  environment:
    name: production
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: manual
    - when: never
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache bash
    - mkdir -p "$DEPLOY_DIR"
    - printf '#!/usr/bin/env sh\nset -e\necho "Deploying to PRODUCTION"\n./dist/bin/app\necho "--- config ---"\ncat ./dist/config/app.conf\n' > "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
    - chmod +x "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
    - "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
